title: Choose Your Service
description: Select copy trading, indicator development, EA development, or EA rental based on your trading needs.

title: Share Your Requirements
description: We gather your platform details, strategy logic, risk settings, and broker execution preferences.

title: Deployment and Setup
description: Our team configures your MT4/MT5 environment and deploys your solution for smooth live execution.

title: Run and Scale
description: Launch your system, monitor performance, and scale with upgrades, rentals, and ongoing support.
